markets.question: Will the July 2026 FOMC statement include forward-looking rate guidance?
markets.description: If the inclusion of forward-looking rate guidance in the July 2026 FOMC statement is confirmed by any of the Source Agencies after Issuance and before Jul 30, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.resolution_criteria: If the inclusion of forward-looking rate guidance in the July 2026 FOMC statement is confirmed by any of the Source Agencies after Issuance and before Jul 30, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.

markets.question: Will the Federal Reserve Hike rates by 25bps at their July 2026 meeting?
markets.description: If the Federal Reserve does a Hike of 25bps on July 29, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.resolution_criteria: If the Federal Reserve does a Hike of 25bps on July 29, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.

markets.question: Will Federal Funds Rate Decision be No change AND Dissents be 0 for Jul 2026?
markets.description: If ALL of the following occur for Jul 2026: Federal Funds Rate Decision: No change, Dissents: 0, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.resolution_criteria: If ALL of the following occur for Jul 2026: Federal Funds Rate Decision: No change, Dissents: 0, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.outcome_label: Federal Funds Rate Decision: No change, Dissents: 0

markets.question: Will the upper bound of the federal funds rate be above 3.75% following the Fed's Jul 29, 2026 meeting?
markets.description: If the upper bound of the target federal funds rate published on the Federal Reserve's official website is greater than 3.75% following the Federal Reserve's Jul 29, 2026 meeting, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.resolution_criteria: If the upper bound of the target federal funds rate published on the Federal Reserve's official website is greater than 3.75% following the Federal Reserve's Jul 29, 2026 meeting, then the market resolves to Yes.
